info.title: Duma CRM API
info.description:
## Welcome to the Duma CRM API

The Duma CRM API powers the backend for a multi-tenant café franchise platform — handling order management, real-time stock tracking, customer loyalty, staff shifts, and analytics across multiple brands and locations.

---

## Authentication

All endpoints except `/health` and `/auth/*` require a valid session cookie. Sign in at `POST /auth/sign-in/email` and the cookie is set automatically by the browser.

---

## Role & Scope Model

Access is controlled by a **role** + **scope** combination on each staff profile.

| Role | Rank | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `super_admin` | 100 | Full access across all tenants |
| `franchise_owner` | 80 | Full access within their tenant |
| `store_manager` | 60 | Manage their assigned locations |
| `hr_manager` / `marketing_manager` / `auditor` | 40 | Read-only access in specific domains |
| `barista` | 20 | Create orders, clock in/out |

| Scope | Description |
|---|---|
| `global` | All locations within the tenant |
| `franchise` | Full franchise-wide access |
| `location` | Only explicitly assigned location IDs |

Endpoints that say **"store_manager+"** use `requireMinRole` — any role with rank ≥ 60 passes.

---

## Key Concepts

- **Tenants** — Franchise brands. Each tenant owns locations, menu items, modifiers, and stock items.
- **Locations** — Physical outlets. Menu items and modifiers are enabled per-location with optional price overrides.
- **Orders** — Created from POS (`pos`) or mobile (`mobile`). Placing an order auto-deducts stock; cancelling refunds it. Completing awards loyalty points. Supports pagination, bulk status updates (`PATCH /orders/bulk-status`), soft delete (`DELETE /orders/:id`), and CSV/JSON export (`GET /orders/export`). Customers can view their own orders at `GET /orders/my`.
- **Stock** — Tracked at tenant level and per-location. Low-stock alerts are returned alongside each order response. Bulk-update up to 50 location stock quantities in one request via `PATCH /location-stock/bulk`. Query all rows below threshold via `GET /location-stock/alerts`. View paginated movement history per item at `GET /stock-items/:id/movements`.
- **Customers** — End consumers who can self-register via `POST /customers/me`, which links their account to an existing POS record matched by phone number.
- **Shifts** — Staff clock in/out per location. Active shifts are queryable in real time. Store managers and above can list all shifts with an optional `?locationId` filter.
- **Analytics** — All analytics endpoints require `store_manager+` and accept `from`, `to` (ISO 8601), and `locationId` query parameters. Date range defaults to the last 30 days. Responses include `Cache-Control` headers (60–300 s).
- **Audit Logs** — The following actions write an immutable audit row: order create/cancel/status change, bulk status update, staff creation, stock adjust/transfer/bulk update, data export, tenant delete, location delete. Query via `GET /audit-logs` (`franchise_owner+`, paginated).
- **Pagination** — `GET /orders` and `GET /audit-logs` support `?page` and `?limit` and return `{ data, total, page, limit, pages }`.

post.description: Creates a new user account. Returns the user object and sets a session cookie.

200.description: User created and session cookie set

422.description: Email already in use or validation error

post.description: Authenticates an existing user. Returns the session object and sets a session cookie.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user and session details from the session cookie. Returns `null` if not signed in.

post.description: Invalidates the current session and clears the session cookie.
Creates a Better Auth user and attaches a staff profile with role, scope, and optional location assignments. Writes an audit log.

get.description: Returns all staff profiles for the tenant. super_admin sees all tenants. store_manager+ only.
Returns the staff profile for the authenticated user including role, scope, and assigned locations.

get.summary: Get staff profile by user ID
get.description: Returns a staff profile by user ID. store_manager+ only.

patch.description: Updates role, scope, location assignments, or active status. super_admin only. Writes an audit log.

post.description: Creates a new customer record for a tenant. Staff use only.

409.description: Phone number already exists for this tenant

get.description: Paginated customer list. Super admin sees all tenants; others see their own tenant only. Supports free-text search across name, phone, and email, plus optional tier filter.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by first name, last name, phone, or email

200.description: { data: Customer[], total, page, limit, pages }

get.description: Returns the customer profile linked to the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new customer profile or links the authenticated user to an existing POS customer matched by phone number.

409.description: Profile already exists or phone linked to another account

patch.description: Manually add or remove loyalty points. Positive delta adds, negative removes. Floors at 0. store_manager+ only.

delta.description: Positive to add, negative to deduct. Must be non-zero.

reason.description: Optional reason shown in audit context

post.description: Creates a new tenant (franchise brand). Super admin only.

get.description: Returns all tenants ordered by name. Super admin only.

delete.description: Hard deletes a tenant. Locations cascade if FK is configured. Super admin only. Writes an audit log.

post.description: Creates a new physical location for a tenant. Super admin only.

get.description: Super admin sees all locations. Franchise-scoped staff see their tenant's locations. Location-scoped staff see only their assigned locations.
Returns all locations for a given tenant. Non-super_admin staff can only query their own tenant.

patch.description: Super admin only.

delete.description: Super admin only. Writes an audit log.

patch.description: Activates or deactivates a location. store_manager+ only (less restrictive than full PATCH which is super_admin only).

post.description: Creates a new menu item for a tenant. Super admin only.

get.description: Super admin sees all. Others see only their tenant's menu items.

patch.description: Super admin only.

post.description: Creates a new modifier group (e.g. "Milk", "Size"). Super admin only.

get.description: Super admin sees all. Others see only their tenant's modifier groups, ordered by sortOrder.

patch.description: Super admin only.

post.description: Creates a new modifier within a modifier group (e.g. "Oat Milk", "Large"). Super admin only.

get.description: Super admin sees all. Others see only their tenant's modifiers, ordered by sortOrder.
Returns all modifiers for a given modifier group, filtered to the caller's tenant.

patch.description: Super admin only.

post.summary: Link modifier group to menu item
post.description: Attaches a modifier group to a menu item. Super admin only.

get.summary: List modifier groups for a menu item
get.description: Returns all modifier group links for the given menu item ID.

delete.summary: Remove modifier group from menu item

post.description: Enables a menu item at a specific location with an optional price override. Super admin only.

get.summary: List menu items for a location
get.description: Returns all menu item links for the given location. Location-scoped staff can only query their assigned locations.

patch.description: Update availability or price override for a menu item at a location. Super admin only.

post.description: Enables a modifier at a specific location with an optional price override. Super admin only.

get.description: Returns all modifier links for the given location. Location-scoped staff can only query their assigned locations.

patch.description: Update availability or price override for a modifier at a location. Super admin only.
Update the status of up to 100 orders at once. store_manager+ only.

delete.description: Sets deletedAt — record retained for audit. store_manager+ only.

get.description: Returns a full order with items and modifiers.

get.summary: Export orders as CSV or JSON
get.description: Returns a downloadable file. Supports ?from, ?to, ?status, ?locationId, ?format=(csv|json). store_manager+ only.

post.description: Creates a new order, deducts inventory, and returns low-stock alerts. Writes an audit log.

400.description: Item or modifier unavailable at location

403.description: Forbidden — wrong location or no tenant

get.description: Returns paginated orders scoped to the caller's role. Super admin sees all; franchise/location staff see their own locations.

200.description: { data: Order[], total: number, page: number, limit: number, pages: number }

get.description: Returns all orders for the authenticated customer, with items and modifiers.

200.description: Array of orders with items and modifiers

patch.description: Transitions an order to a new status. Cancelling refunds inventory; completing awards loyalty points. Writes an audit log.

post.description: Creates a new trackable stock item (e.g. "Oat Milk", "Espresso Shots"). Super admin only.

get.description: Super admin sees all. Others see only their tenant's stock items, ordered by name.
Paginated audit trail of all stock movements for a specific stock item. store_manager+ only.

200.description: { data: StockMovement[], total, page, limit, pages }

patch.description: Super admin only.
Update up to 50 stock quantities. Each logs a stock_movement row. store_manager+ only.

400.description: Validation error or stock row not found

post.description: Starts tracking a stock item at a specific location. Super admin only.

409.description: Stock item already assigned to this location

post.description: Applies a positive or negative delta to the current quantity. Floors at 0 and updates isAvailable. Super admin only. Writes an audit log.

delta.description: Positive to add, negative to remove. Must be non-zero.

200.description: Updated row with previousQuantity, delta, and newQuantity

post.description: Moves a quantity of a stock item from one location to another. The destination must already track the stock item. Super admin only. Writes an audit log.

400.description: Insufficient stock or destination not seeded

post.description: Moves a quantity from the tenant-level (warehouse) stock into this location. Fails if tenant stock is insufficient. Super admin only. Writes an audit log.

quantity.description: Amount to move from warehouse to location

200.description: Transfer summary with warehouse and location quantities

404.description: Location stock row or tenant stock not found

get.description: Returns all location stock rows where quantity ≤ lowThreshold. Scoped by role: location staff see their assigned locations only, others see their tenant. store_manager+ only.

parameters.name: locationId
parameters.description: Filter by a specific location UUID.

200.description: Array of low-stock location stock rows with stock item and location details

get.description: Returns all stock items at a location with their quantities. Location-scoped staff can only query their assigned locations.

200.description: Array of location stock rows with stock item details

get.summary: Get location stock row by ID

200.description: Location stock row with stock item details

patch.description: Updates quantity, lowThreshold, or availability for a location stock row. Super admin only.

delete.summary: Remove stock item from location tracking

get.summary: List menu item stock links for tenant
get.description: Returns all stock consumption links for every menu item belonging to the caller's tenant.

200.description: Array of menu-item-stock links with menu item and stock item details

post.summary: Link stock item to menu item
post.description: Records how much of a stock item is consumed when a menu item is ordered. Super admin only.

409.description: Stock item already linked to this menu item

get.summary: Get stock links for a menu item
get.description: Returns all stock items consumed when the given menu item is ordered, including stock item details.

patch.description: Updates the consumption quantity for a menu-item-stock link. Super admin only.

delete.summary: Remove stock link from menu item

post.description: Records how much of a stock item is consumed when a modifier is applied (e.g. 30ml vanilla syrup). Super admin only.

409.description: Stock item already linked to this modifier

get.summary: Get stock links for a modifier
get.description: Returns all stock items consumed by the given modifier, including stock item details.

200.description: Array of modifier-stock links with stock item details

patch.description: Updates the consumption quantity for a modifier-stock link. Super admin only.

get.description: Returns all stock items tracked at tenant level with their current quantities.

200.description: Array of tenant stock rows with stock item details

post.description: Starts tracking a stock item at the tenant level. Super admin only.

409.description: Stock item already tracked at tenant level

post.description: Applies a positive or negative delta to the current quantity. Floors at 0. Super admin only. Writes an audit log.

delta.description: Positive to add, negative to remove. Must be non-zero.

200.description: Updated row with previousQuantity, delta, and newQuantity

get.summary: Get tenant stock for a stock item
get.description: Returns the tenant-level stock row plus a per-location breakdown for the given stock item.

200.description: Object with global tenant row and location breakdown array

patch.description: Updates quantity and/or lowThreshold for a tenant stock row. Super admin only.

delete.summary: Remove stock item from tenant tracking

post.description: Starts a shift for the authenticated user at the given location. Returns 409 if already clocked in.
Ends the active shift for the authenticated user at the given location. Returns the shift with durationMinutes.

get.description: Returns all currently clocked-in shifts. Location-scoped staff see only their first assigned location.

200.description: Array of active shifts with staff and location details

get.description: Returns all shifts for the authenticated user, ordered by most recent first.

200.description: Array of shifts with location details

get.description: Returns all shifts ordered by most recent first. Super admin only.

200.description: Array of shifts with staff and location details

get.description: Revenue, order count, avg order value, breakdown by status and source, plus daily revenue.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of date range (ISO 8601). Defaults to 30 days ago.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of date range (ISO 8601). Defaults to now.

200.description: Object with summary, byStatus, bySource, and daily arrays

get.description: Best selling menu items by quantity and revenue within the date range.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of date range (ISO 8601). Defaults to 30 days ago.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of date range (ISO 8601). Defaults to now.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of items to return. Defaults to 10.

200.description: Array of top items with totalQuantity, totalRevenue, and orderCount

get.description: Full audit log of stock deductions and restocks with staff, location, and order context.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of date range (ISO 8601). Defaults to 30 days ago.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of date range (ISO 8601). Defaults to now.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of movements to return. Defaults to 100.

200.description: Array of stock movements with stock item, location, order, and user details

get.description: Total deducted vs restocked per stock item in the date range, grouped by type.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of date range (ISO 8601). Defaults to 30 days ago.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of date range (ISO 8601). Defaults to now.

200.description: Array of { stockItemId, type, totalQty, movementCount }

get.description: Predicts stock needs per location based on historical deduction patterns. Returns average daily consumption, days of stock remaining, predicted stockout date, and recommended reorder quantity. Items with no observed consumption return null for time-based fields. Results are sorted: critical items first (≤ 3 days remaining), then ascending by days remaining. store_manager+ only.

parameters.name: locationId
parameters.description: Filter by a specific location UUID.

parameters.name: lookbackDays
parameters.description: Days of movement history used to compute avg daily consumption. Defaults to 30.

parameters.name: forecastDays
parameters.description: Days ahead to cover when computing recommendedReorderQuantity. Defaults to 14.

200.description: Array of { locationStockId, stockItemName, unit, currentQuantity, avgDailyConsumption, daysOfStockRemaining, predictedStockoutDate, recommendedReorderQuantity, isLow, isCritical }

get.description: Total revenue and order count grouped by location for the given date range. store_manager+ only.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of date range (ISO 8601). Defaults to 30 days ago.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of date range (ISO 8601). Defaults to now.

200.description: Array of { locationId, locationName, totalRevenue, orderCount }

get.description: Order count and revenue grouped by hour of day (0–23) for the given date range. store_manager+ only.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of date range (ISO 8601). Defaults to 30 days ago.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of date range (ISO 8601). Defaults to now.

200.description: Array of { hour, orderCount, totalRevenue } for hours 0–23

get.description: Total hours worked per staff member within the date range, derived from completed shifts. store_manager+ only.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of date range (ISO 8601). Defaults to 30 days ago.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of date range (ISO 8601). Defaults to now.

200.description: Array of { userId, userName, totalShifts, totalMinutes, totalHours }

get.description: New vs returning customers within the date range. A customer is "new" if their first-ever order falls within the window. store_manager+ only.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of date range (ISO 8601). Defaults to 30 days ago.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of date range (ISO 8601). Defaults to now.

get.description: Paginated audit log. franchise_owner+ only.

get.summary: Generate or retrieve a PDF receipt for an order
get.description: Returns a PDF receipt. Generates and caches on first call. ?type=invoice for invoice format. ?download=false for JSON.

200.description: PDF binary or JSON receipt data

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's HR record including personal info, emergency contacts, and employment details.

patch.description: Employees can update their own address, emergency contacts, and bank/NI details.

post.description: Creates an HR profile for a staff member in the manager's tenant. store_manager+ only.

409.description: Profile already exists for this user

get.description: Returns all HR employee profiles for the tenant. store_manager+ only.
Returns HR details for a specific staff member. store_manager+ only.

patch.description: Updates job-related fields (title, department, employment type, dates). store_manager+ only.

delete.description: Removes the HR profile for an employee (offboarding). store_manager+ only.

get.description: Returns all leave types configured for the tenant. Visible to all authenticated staff.

post.description: Creates a new leave category for the tenant. store_manager+ only.

patch.description: Updates a leave type configuration. store_manager+ only.

delete.description: Removes a leave type. store_manager+ only.

get.description: Returns all leave entitlements for the authenticated user. Optionally filter by year.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Filter by year (e.g. 2026). Defaults to current year.

200.description: Array of entitlement objects with leaveType details

get.description: Returns leave entitlements for all staff in the tenant. store_manager+ only.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Filter by year. Defaults to current year.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Filter by a specific user ID.

post.description: Assigns a leave allowance to an employee for a specific year and leave type. store_manager+ only.

409.description: Entitlement already exists for this user/type/year

patch.description: Adjusts totalDays or usedDays for an entitlement. store_manager+ only.

get.description: Returns all leave requests submitted by the authenticated user, most recent first.

200.description: Array of leave request objects with leaveType details

post.description: Submits a leave request. Auto-approved if the leave type has requiresApproval = false. Returns 422 if the employee has insufficient entitlement.

get.description: Returns all leave requests for the tenant. store_manager+ only.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status. Defaults to pending.

patch.summary: Approve or decline a leave request
patch.description: Managers approve or decline a pending leave request. On approval, the entitlement usedDays is incremented. store_manager+ only.

get.description: Returns a single leave request. Employees can only view their own.

200.description: Leave request object with leaveType details

patch.description: Employees can update dates and notes on their own pending requests.

400.description: Only pending requests can be edited

403.description: Can only edit your own requests

patch.description: Employees can cancel their own pending leave requests.

400.description: Only pending requests can be cancelled

403.description: Can only cancel your own requests

get.description: Returns all absence log entries for the authenticated user.
Returns all absence records for the tenant. store_manager+ only.

post.description: Managers log an unplanned absence retroactively for an employee. store_manager+ only.

delete.description: Removes an absence record. store_manager+ only.

get.description: Returns all finalised payslips for the authenticated user, most recent first.
Returns all payslips for the tenant including drafts. franchise_owner+ only.

post.description: Creates a draft payslip for an employee. super_admin only.

get.description: Returns a single payslip. Employees can only retrieve their own finalised payslips.

patch.description: Updates a draft payslip. super_admin only. Cannot edit finalised payslips.
Marks a draft payslip as finalised, making it visible to the employee. Irreversible. super_admin only.

get.description: Returns company-wide documents plus any documents assigned specifically to the authenticated user.

post.description: Adds a document record. Omit userId to make it company-wide. store_manager+ only.

get.description: Returns every document for the tenant regardless of assignment. store_manager+ only.
Returns a document. Employees can only access company-wide docs or their own.

delete.description: Removes a document record. super_admin only.

get.description: Returns all expense claims submitted by the authenticated user.

post.description: Submits a new expense claim for manager approval.

get.description: Returns expense claims for the tenant. store_manager+ only.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status. Defaults to pending.

patch.description: Approve, decline, or mark an expense as paid. store_manager+ only.

400.description: Claim is not in a reviewable state

patch.description: Employees can cancel their own pending expense claims.

400.description: Only pending claims can be cancelled

403.description: Can only cancel your own claims
